title: Ramappa Temple
tagline: Ramappa Temple — spiritual town of Telangana

overview.short: Ramappa Temple, also known as the Rudreshwara Temple, is a Kakatiya style Hindu temple dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva, located in Palampet village, Mulugu district, Telangana, In
overview.description: Ramappa Temple, also known as the Rudreshwara Temple, is a Kakatiya style Hindu temple dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva, located in Palampet village, Mulugu district, Telangana, India. It is 15 km (9.3 mi) from Mulugu, 66 km (41 mi) from Warangal, 209 km (130 mi) from Hyderabad. An inscription in the temple says it was constructed in the year 1213 CE by Recherla Rudra—a general of Kakatiya ruler Ganapati Deva (r. 1199–1262). Located in the vicinity of Ramappa Lake, the Ramappa Temple complex which consists of three temples was constructed between 1212 and 1234, designed by Ramappa — after whom

topPlaces.name: Venkatapur
topPlaces.description: Venkatapur is a village and a mandal in Mulugu district in the state of Telangana, India. It is the second-largest revenue village of the district, comprising around 12,000 people.

topPlaces.name: Mulugu
topPlaces.description: Mulugu is a town in Mulugu district, Telangana. It is the headquarters of the district, which was formed in 2019 after Jayashankar Bhupalpally district was split.

items.note: Venkatapur is a village and a mandal in Mulugu district in the state of Telangana, India. It is the second-largest revenue village of the district, comprising around 12,000 people.
Mulugu is a town in Mulugu district, Telangana. It is the headquarters of the district, which was formed in 2019 after Jayashankar Bhupalpally district was split.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ramappa Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ramappa Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ramappa Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (196 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (178 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ramappa Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ramappa Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ramappa Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Ramappa Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ramappa Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Venkatapur, Mulugu.
